focus: Q3 GBDT retraining + drift detection — 4-axis drift taxonomy (data numerical PSI 0.20 / data categorical JensenShannon 0.1 / prediction Wasserstein 0.1 / label PSI 0.20) + hybrid trigger policy (scheduled weekly floor + drift-sustained-2d + MAE+15% ceiling) + label-latency-aware training feature snapshot + MLflow shadow/canary/production/archived state machine + Option A Postgres feature store + n8n drift_tick workflow wiring to Q2 performance_metrics

NannyML www.nannyml.com/blog URL (404)

SMOTE for tabular LightGBM class imbalance (use sample_weight instead)
Daily retraining cadence (label-latency T+168h makes daily structurally wrong)
Feast/Tecton feature store (overkill for viral-ops scale <50M rows)
Focal loss in LightGBM (not standard API)

focus: Q4 4-channel feedback loop L7 to L3 Content Lab - 4 signal dimensions (Engagement/Retention/Completion/Conversion) Goodhart-grounded, percentile-rank normalization per platform-niche-tier-age cohort, per-(variant,platform) Thompson Sampling arm granularity, Beta-Binomial update with impressions_decile virtual-trial scaling, Beta(1,1) cold-start, canonical L7FeedbackEnvelope JSON+Prisma schema with quality_flags, 5 vanity-metric guardrails (rage/bot/clickbait/algo-boost/multi-dim sanity), GBDT drift to Thompson quarantine-not-reset ripple, terminology bridge between L3 cadences and L7 dimensions
noveltyJustification: 9 net-new artifacts (terminology bridge, 4-channel Goodhart justification, early/stable time-window semantics, L7FeedbackEnvelope schema, Beta-Binomial impressions_decile scaling, 5 vanity-metric guardrails, drift-to-Thompson quarantine policy answering iter-3 open Q, L7-Feedback-Emitter 6th workflow, percentile-rank cohort matching) + 3 refinements at 0.5 each (Chapelle-Li 2011 Beta(1,1) primary citation, Goodhart mitigation grounding, IG Reels metric names verified from primary source); raw 0.875, conservative 0.80 after discounting reels_skip_rate exact-endpoint gap and arxiv 2001.07426 dead-end cost
ruledOut: 3-dimension decomposition collapsing Completion into Retention
5-dimension decomposition adding Reach as channel
Single composite scalar (Goodhart violation)
Z-score normalization (non-robust to power-law viral distribution)
Pure Beta-Bernoulli with threshold binarization (loses calibration)
Reset Thompson arms on GBDT drift (quarantine strictly better)
Single-platform rollup for Thompson arms (need per-variant-per-platform granularity)
arxiv.org/abs/2001.07426 (wrong paper: causal-effects not bandits)
Instagram Platform Insights overview page as citation source (index only, use media-insights reference)

graphEvents.label: Percentile-rank within platform x niche x tier x age cohort
Optional aggregate by impression-share for niche-level cadences
Beta-Binomial posterior update with impressions_decile scaling
Rage engagement guardrail (high eng + low ret + low conv)
Bot traffic guardrail (impression spike w/o engagement velocity)
Clickbait-and-switch guardrail (high hook survival + low completion)
Algorithmic boost guardrail (FYP share >70% small creator)
Multi-dim sanity gate (no single dim >0.95 with 3 others <0.30)
GBDT drift ripple: pause Thompson updates, widen epsilon 0.20->0.40 (NOT reset)
Chapelle & Li 2011 NeurIPS Thompson Sampling primary citation
Goodhart mitigation - multiple diverse metrics (4-channel grounding)
Terminology bridge L3 four cadences vs L7 four signal dimensions

focus: Q5 prompt tuning automation — prompt parameter registry (tunable/locked matrix per 5 L3 stages), PromptTemplateVersion Prisma schema with lifecycle+MLflow FK+lock-list fingerprint, three-layer experiment separation (L3a content/L3b template/L3c parameter), cohort-matched generation-level A/B with Welch+Bayesian dual-test, guardrail-veto on A/B promotion, nested Thompson-Thompson meta-bandit with credit-attribution rule, per-stage independent meta-bandits, SHADOW/CANARY/PROD_PARTIAL/PROD_FULL state machine + auto-revert + 14d cool-down, L3_AUTO_TUNE_FROZEN circuit breaker, MLflow prompt-as-artifact with reproducibility version-triple, drift coupling policy matrix with quarantine-not-reset + epsilon-widen resumption, L3-Prompt-Tuner 7th L3 workflow with event-driven pause/quarantine hooks, meta-concerns (prompt Goodhart/model collapse/Thai erosion) with layered mitigations, phased implementation MVP->OPRO->DSPy->PromptBreeder
noveltyJustification: 10 net-new artifacts (prompt parameter registry, PromptTemplateVersion schema, 3-layer experiment separation, cohort-matched A/B harness with dual-test, nested Thompson-Thompson meta-bandit + credit attribution, per-stage independence, canary state machine + auto-revert + cool-down, MLflow prompt namespace + reproducibility triple + lock-list fingerprint, drift coupling policy matrix, L3-Prompt-Tuner workflow) + 3 refinements at 0.5 each (iter-4 monthly recalibration placement, MLflow extension from models to prompts, Goodhart mitigation from envelope layer to prompt layer); raw 0.88; +0.05 simplicity bonus for resolving iter-4 implicit Thompson recalibration placement via section C.4 and G.2; conservative 0.85 discounting arXiv-abstract-only hyperparameter depth (Q5.open-1/2/3/4)
ruledOut: Single global bandit across all stages
UCB1 for meta-bandit (less robust under delayed feedback than Thompson)
Extending L3-Feedback-Aggregator instead of new L3-Prompt-Tuner workflow
Letting auto-tuner continue during L2 drift (stale signal + amplification loop)
Resetting meta-bandit posteriors on drift (quarantine not reset, same as iter-4)
Allowing auto-tuner to modify locked parameters (legal/brand/pipeline/ToS)
Tuning prompt+content simultaneously without cohort matching (confounding)
Single-channel win as promotion criterion (Goodhart)
No cool-down after revert (oscillation risk)
Welch alone without Bayesian sanity
arXiv abstract pages as sole source for full hyperparameters

focus: GAP CLOSURE + DEFERRED ITEMS validation -- TikTok Business API third-pass confirmation (DEFINITIVE dead-end), DSPy v3.1.3 + MIPROv2 concrete hyperparameters (auto modes light/medium/heavy, default demos=4, Bayesian 3-step), OPRO Phase 2 + DSPy Phase 3 + PromptBreeder Phase 4 ordering validated, Thai-specific cohort extensions (thai_formality axis + code_switch_level axis + particle-ratio validator + English-loanword cap), 5-layer loop stability via cadence-separation principle + circuit-breaker triad, scale sanity (3x headroom from TikTok 250/day bottleneck, 10x reconfigurable, Postgres 10-year storage comfortable), explicit Q1-Q5 registry resolution

ruledOut: TikTok Business API URL guessing (third-pass confirmed structural dead-end)
arxiv.org/pdf/* direct PDF extraction via WebFetch (binary not decoded)
Delaying convergence for full hyperparameter depth (implementation-phase task)

summary: Platform analytics APIs mapped: TikTok Research API (POST /v2/research/video/query/, 1000 req/day, no retention curve), YouTube Analytics v2 (GET /v2/reports, flat 1-unit quota, audienceRetention = best retention curve), Instagram Graph v25 (GET /{media}/insights, BUC 4800x/24h, new Dec 2025 reels_skip_rate hook-quality signal), Facebook Graph v21 (GET /{object}/insights, post_video_retention_graph, June 2026 deprecation). TikTok first-party Business/Creator analytics API = DEFINITIVE structural dead-end (iter-6 third-pass confirmed); L7 uses Research API + Login Kit v2 fallback with Channel 2 (Retention) returning NULL for TikTok.

Ingestion pipeline architecture defined: polling-with-reconciliation CDC pattern via n8n poll_scheduler + Node/TS BullMQ fetch_worker + Prisma upsert_layer; canonical performance_metrics schema with (content_id, platform, platform_post_id, metric_date) composite-key idempotent upsert; retention_curve JSONB shape normalized across 4 platforms; shared rate_limit_tracker with 004-platform-upload; 3-tier retry + ingestion_dlq queue; poll cadences T+1h/T+24h/T+7d; TikTok 250-posts/day budget, YouTube 800-posts/day budget validated; BUC formula correction from iter-1 (4800x/24h rolling, not 200x/hr).

GBDT retraining + drift detection fully specified: 4-axis drift taxonomy (numerical PSI 0.20 / categorical JensenShannon 0.1 / prediction Wasserstein 0.1 / label PSI 0.20) + 5th performance axis (MAE+15%) + 6th correlation axis (Spearman<0.15); hybrid trigger policy (weekly floor + drift-sustained-2d + performance-immediate + milestone-200-labels); label-latency-aware training_feature_snapshots (frozen 38-feature vector + labelY at T+168h); MLflow None->Staging(shadow/canary)->Production->Archived state machine; drift_events auditable Prisma ledger; Python ml-trainer worker + FastAPI inference co-located with BERTopic; n8n drift_detection_tick workflow at */30 min; Option A Postgres feature store (<50M rows, Feast/Tecton overkill).

4-channel feedback L7->L3 defined: Engagement/Retention/Completion/Conversion with Goodhart mitigation grounding; percentile-rank normalization per (platform x niche x tier x age) cohort extended iter-6 with (thai_formality x code_switch_level) axes for Thai; per-(variant, platform) Thompson arm granularity; Beta-Binomial posterior update with impressions_decile virtual-trial scaling; Beta(1,1) cold-start (Chapelle-Li 2011) + forced exploration under 100 impressions; 5 vanity-metric guardrails (rage/bot/clickbait/algo-boost/multi-dim sanity) attached via quality_flags; L7FeedbackEnvelope canonical JSON + Prisma l7_feedback_envelopes; windows T+24h early, T+7d stable, T+30d conversion long-tail; drift-to-Thompson quarantine-not-reset with epsilon widen 0.20->0.40; L7-Feedback-Emitter n8n workflow at */1h.

Prompt tuning automation fully specified: PromptTemplateVersion Prisma registry with lifecycle (PROPOSED/SHADOW/CANARY/PROD_PARTIAL/PROD_FULL/ARCHIVED/REVERTED) + MLflow FK + lock-list SHA-256 fingerprint guard + parent_version lineage; 3-layer experiment separation L3a(content)/L3b(template)/L3c(parameter) with distinct randomization units; cohort-matched A/B harness with Welch t-test + Bayesian dual-test and >=126 envelopes per arm; guardrail veto on all 5 iter-4 quality flags; nested Thompson-Thompson meta-bandit per-stage with credit-attribution via variant.stage_prompt_version_ids; SHADOW(0%/24h)->CANARY(5%/72h)->PROD_PARTIAL(25%/7d)->PROD_FULL state machine with auto-revert on 5 triggers + 14d cool-down; L3_AUTO_TUNE_FROZEN circuit breaker; MLflow prompts namespace with reproducibility triple (l2_model_version, l3_prompt_version_chain, code_sha); drift coupling policy matrix; L3-Prompt-Tuner 7th L3 n8n workflow cron daily + event-driven pause/quarantine hooks; meta-concern mitigations layered (Goodhart/model-collapse/Thai-erosion); phased rollout MVP->OPRO(Phase 2)->DSPy MIPROv2 auto=light(Phase 3)->PromptBreeder(Phase 4); iter-6 validated DSPy v3.1.3 + MIPROv2 defaults (max_bootstrapped_demos=4, max_labeled_demos=4, 3-step Bayesian).
